tasks.label: Build Pet
tasks.command: cmd /c "if not exist build mkdir build && ""D:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\BuildTools\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvarsall.bat"" x64 && cl /std:c++17 /EHsc /I Source Source\Main\main.cpp Source\Core\Path.cpp Source\Core\Diary.cpp Source\Engine\Window\Window.cpp Source\Engine\Render\Render.cpp Source\Engine\Input\InputDispatcher.cpp Source\Engine\Input\InputChat.cpp Source\Runtime\Scheduler.cpp Source\Runtime\EventBus.cpp Source\Runtime\StateManager.cpp Source\Systems\Pet\Pet.cpp Source\Systems\Pet\PetComponents\AudioComponent.cpp Source\Systems\Chat\Chat.cpp Source\Systems\Setting\Setting.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIActor.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIManager.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIComponents\CloseComponent.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIComponents\ScrollComponent.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIComponents\DragComponent.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIComponents\InputComponent.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIPanels\ChatPanels.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIPanels\TaskPanels.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIPanels\SettingPanels.cpp Source\Systems\UI\UIPanels\OverlayPanels.cpp /Fo"build\\" /Fe"Distribution\Miss qing\Pet.exe" /link user32.lib gdi32.lib gdiplus.lib winmm.lib"
